attr.title: U R 4 GUYS
attr.desc: You are four guys, but you only have two thumbs. This "single-player co-op" game will test the relationship between your brain and your hands. Each of the four guys is bound to a different input cluster — left stick, right stick, dpad, face buttons — and you control them all simultaneously. Survive waves of foes, climb the leaderboard, and clear the game to unlock a secret.
attr.inst: Ready to run. No external files needed.
